title: Shooting Star (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Shooting Star''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Shooting Star]]''', a [[fathier]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Shooting Star (call sign)|Shooting Star]]''', the starfighter callsign of Jedi Master [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]]
*'''[[Shooting Star (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Shooting Star'' (Nebulon-B)]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]]
*'''[[Shooting Star (Corona-class frigate)|''Shooting Star'' (''Corona''-class)]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Corona-class frigate|''Corona''-class frigate]]
*'''[[Shooting Star (Remmik Kulavinar's ship)]]''', ship of [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] [[Madhi Vaandt]]
*'''[[WR-542 Shooting Star]]''', a [[Courier/Legends|Courier ship]] Class
*'''[[VGK-3 Shooting Star class starfighter]]''', a Heavy Assault Starfighter
*'''Shooting Stars of Nantama''', the famous exploding novas of [[Nantama]]

{{Disambig}}
